values.value: [Auto] Severity set to LOW. Single go-arounds are routine and rarely indicate a customer-impacting issue. Check if multiple aircraft at the same site have gone around in the past 60 minutes — if so, escalate to MEDIUM and link to any active weather case for the site. Track whether the affected aircraft completes a successful approach within 30 minutes (auto-tracked). If a second go-around occurs on the same flight, escalate to MEDIUM and add a new timeline event.
